title: COVID-19 vaccines: Additional doses (video) - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19 vaccines: Additional doses (video)
Current position: 00:00:00
Total time: --:--:--
Described visual: In a living room, there is a young adult  with their sleeve rolled up.
Narration: COVID-19 vaccines have helped protect  us. Over time, the antibodies created after vaccination  have been found to decrease.
Described visual: There is a zoom in on  the adult’s arm and there  are a few animated antibodies moving as if they are going through the  bloodstream.
Narration: Additional  doses of COVID-19 vaccine can help strengthen our immune response and protect  against severe disease.
Described visual: Many more antibodies start to appear.
Narration: Learn more and  book your next dose.
Text on screen: Learn more at Canada.ca/covid-vaccine.
Narration: A message from  the Government of Canada
Described  visual: The  Government of Canada logo appears.
